# Akash Khatri

> Software Development Engineer at Amazon (Seattle, WA). MS Computer Science, University of Utah (2025, 4.0 GPA). First-author of "Sort it Like You Mean It" (PVLDB 2025). Architects backend services, AWS data pipelines, and LLM-powered systems in Java, Python, and Go.

## Contact

- Email: akash.m.khatri@gmail.com
- Phone: +1 (801) 403-3512
- Location: Seattle, Washington, USA
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/akashkhatri/
- GitHub: https://github.com/AkashKhatrii
- LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/akashkhatrii

## Site map

- [About / Hero](https://akashkhatri.com/#main): Identity, current role (SDE @ Amazon), headline stats

- [Experience](https://akashkhatri.com/#internship): Amazon SDE, AI/ML Research Assistant (Utah), Graduate TA (Utah), prior internships
- [Projects](https://akashkhatri.com/#projects): InsightSort (featured / PVLDB 2025), SmartBillAgent, Raft Consensus Engine, CollabHub, CNNs for Text Classification, UrbanAid, Road Damage Detection, Paraclone, Teeter
- [Publications](https://akashkhatri.com/#publications): "Sort it Like You Mean It" — PVLDB 2025, Vol. 18, No. 12
